title: Run retrieval v2 promotion evaluation
goal: Compare retrieval variants with recall/MRR/range coverage/miss taxonomy before default promotion

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Verified existing Lenskit retrieval v2 promotion evaluation surfaces on current main.

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t017-scope-bound: Existing Lenskit main evaluates retrieval variants with recall/MRR, promotion gates, review metrics and miss taxonomy without broadening default promotion.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t017-boundary-preserved: Retrieval evaluation remains diagnostic and does not mutate Git, refresh snapshots, create PRs or claim runtime/review correctness.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t017-tests-or-gap: Targeted retrieval, promotion, review and context-quality tests passed: 107 total.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t017-non-claims: Evaluation metrics do not establish retrieval completeness, semantic correctness, runtime correctness, test sufficiency, review completeness or merge readiness.
